raw_response_text:
<explanation>The target image displays a flower with broad petals featuring pink and white striping, paired with a central cluster of dark-purple and yellow stamens. This matches the visual features of the class 81 examples, which are pink/white striped clematis flowers, unlike the solid yellow irises seen in class 14 examples.</explanation>
<response>81</response>
